data.current_description: Scrape and parse a webpage. Returns the raw HTML content of the requested page. Supports JavaScript rendering, geographic targeting, premium proxies, and device emulation. Automatic retry mechanism with up to 60 seconds timeout.
data.summary_suggestion: Scrape and parse webpage with advanced rendering options
data.description_suggestion: Fetches and parses a webpage URL, returning raw HTML content. Supports JavaScript rendering for dynamic content, geographic targeting for location-specific content, premium proxy rotation for reliability, and device emulation for responsive content. Includes automatic retry mechanism with configurable timeout up to 60 seconds. Requires valid API access token. Returns parsed HTML content or error response if scraping fails after retries.
